2606.05443.title: MIRAI: Prediction and Generation of High-Impact Academic Research
2606.05443.paper_summary: The rapid pace of scientific publishing has made the identification and synthesis of high-impact work an increasingly urgent challenge. We introduce MIRAI (Multi-year Inference of Research trends and Academic Impact), a deep learning framework that predicts paper impact using only it's title, abstract, and publication date. We train MIRAI on the arXiv academic graph to predict 5-year PageRank and citation counts, achieving Spearman's $ρ$ of 0.4686 on PageRank prediction and 0.6192 on citation prediction for papers published in 2021. We propose a research ideation pipeline built on top of MIRAI that produces research ideas oriented towards high impact. These ideas were judged as more impactful than a baseline without MIRAI by an unbiased LLM judge at a 4:3 ratio. We make the 5-year citation prediction model publicly available at https://predict-paper-impact.vercel.app.
2606.05443.paper_summary_zh: 科學出版的快速步伐使得識別和綜合高影響力工作的挑戰變得越來越迫切。<lb/>我們介紹了MIRAI（多年度研究趨勢與學術影響推斷），這是一個深度學習框架，僅使用論文的標題、摘要和出版日期來預測論文的影響。<lb/>我們在arXiv學術圖譜上訓練MIRAI，以預測5年的PageRank和引用次數，對於2021年發表的論文，在PageRank預測中達到0.4686的斯皮爾曼$ρ$，在引用預測中達到0.6192。<lb/>我們提出了一個基於MIRAI的研究構思管道，旨在產生面向高影響力的研究想法。<lb/>這些想法被一位無偏見的LLM評審以4:3的比例評價為比沒有MIRAI的基準更具影響力。<lb/>我們將5年引用預測模型公開提供於https://predict-paper-impact.vercel.app。
2606.05443.author: Alex Li et.al.
